listings.name: Petro Dodge City (Petro Stopping Center #397)
listings.description: Full-service TA/Petro truck stop at I-65 Exit 299 (AL-69 S toward Dodge City/Jasper). 24-hour travel center with diesel lanes, on-site TA Truck Service, CAT scale, tire repair, showers, laundry and multiple restaurants (Iron Skillet, Popeye's, Burger King, Papa John's).
listings.corroboration: TA/Petro official location page, findfuelstops, truckstopsandservices and findtruckservice all agree on name, 426 AL-69 S Hanceville 35077, I-65 Exit 299, phone 256-287-1299, TA Truck Service and CAT scale. Truck-space count 312 is directory-sourced (official page could not be fetched, HTTP 403).

listings.name: TA Truck Service at Petro Dodge City
listings.description: On-site TA Truck Service center (approximately 6 service bays) co-located at Petro Dodge City, I-65 Exit 299. Provides commercial truck maintenance, mechanical repair and tire repair.
listings.corroboration: Multiple directories confirm TA Truck Service with 6 bays and tire repair at Petro Dodge City. Listed as a distinct co-located service per the co-location model.

listings.name: CAT Scale at Petro Dodge City
listings.description: CAT Scale located at Petro Dodge City, I-65 Exit 299, Hanceville.
listings.corroboration: CAT Scale listing for Cullman/Hanceville area at 256-287-1299 matches the Petro Dodge City phone; Petro amenity lists include CAT scale. Distinct co-located row per co-location model.

listings.name: Pilot Travel Center #1550 (Good Hope)
listings.description: 24-hour Pilot Travel Center at I-65 Exit 304 (AL-69 N, Good Hope/Cullman). Diesel lanes, showers, CAT scale, DEF lanes, propane, EV charging, and quick-service food (Wendy's, Dunkin').
listings.corroboration: Pilot official location page, Yelp and iExit agree on 1600 County Road 437, Good Hope/Cullman 35055, phone 256-338-1277, CAT scale, I-65 Exit 304 (AL-69 N). Truck-space count 70 is directory-sourced. Official page returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch.

listings.name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center (Good Hope)
listings.description: CAT Scale located at the Pilot Travel Center on County Road 437, I-65 Exit 304, Good Hope/Cullman.
listings.corroboration: CAT Scale directory lists a scale at I-65 Exit 304 Cullman (256-255-5638); Pilot amenity list confirms CAT scale at this store. Distinct co-located row.

listings.name: Jack's Truck Stop
listings.description: Independent (Shell / AM Best) truck stop at I-65 Exit 304, Good Hope/Cullman, adjacent to the Pilot. Long-established 24-hour stop with showers, laundry, on-site motel, truck and tire repair, and a full-service diner.
listings.hold_reason: Independent truck stop with no official brand/business website; identity, address (1639 CR 437) and services corroborated only by third-party directories (Yelp, iExit, findfuelstops, allstays, TruckMap). Truck-space count (20), truck wash and repair services not verified by a primary source.
listings.corroboration: Multiple independent directories agree on 1639 CR 437, Cullman 35055, I-65 Exit 304, phone 256-739-0220, 24-hour. Held because no official/primary source confirms current operating status, truck-space count or listed services.

listings.name: Love's Travel Stop #877 (Good Hope)
listings.description: Love's Travel Stop opened December 2024 at I-65 Exit 305 (CR 222, Good Hope Road). 24-hour store with 8 diesel bays, CAT scale, RV hookups/dump, dog park, laundry, private showers, and Subway and McDonald's.
listings.corroboration: Love's official location and news pages plus Cullman Times confirm store #877, 497 CR 222 Cullman 35055, 82 truck spaces, 8 diesel bays, CAT scale, opened Dec 2024. ExitExplorer confirms Exit 305 = CR 222 Good Hope Road. Store phone not published, left blank.

listings.name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #877
listings.description: CAT Scale located at Love's Travel Stop #877, I-65 Exit 305, Good Hope/Cullman.
listings.corroboration: Love's official amenity list and Truckers News both list CAT Scales at store #877. Distinct co-located row per co-location model.

listings.name: Pilot Travel Center #441 (Priceville)
listings.description: 24-hour Pilot Travel Center at I-65 Exit 334 (AL-67, Priceville/Decatur). Diesel lanes, showers, CAT scale, laundry, and food (Subway, Wendy's).
listings.corroboration: Pilot official page, findtruckservice and iExit agree on Pilot #441, 3240 Point Mallard Parkway Priceville 35603, I-65 Exit 334, phone 256-353-5252, CAT scale. Truck-space count left blank (a directory 'parking for 90 vehicles' figure was ambiguous as to trucks). Official page returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch.

listings.name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #441
listings.description: CAT Scale located at Pilot Travel Center #441, I-65 Exit 334, Priceville.
listings.corroboration: Multiple directories confirm CAT scale at Pilot #441 Priceville. Distinct co-located row.

listings.name: Cullman County Rest Area (I-65 MM 301)
listings.description: Bidirectional (northbound and southbound) ALDOT rest area at I-65 milepost 301 in Cullman County, with separate truck and car parking, restrooms, water, picnic tables and an RV dump station.
listings.hold_reason: ALDOT confirms a rest area exists near MM 301, but legal overnight parking status is not confirmed by an official source (overnight-stay claims come only from user reviews). Exact mile marker/direction split and truck-space count not officially verified.
listings.corroboration: ALDOT rest-area page plus ParkAdvisor and restareasnearme confirm a bidirectional Cullman County rest area at ~MM 301 with truck parking. Held because legal overnight parking is not officially documented.

listings.name: Truck Wash at Jack's Truck Stop
listings.description: Truck wash reported as an on-site service at Jack's Truck Stop, I-65 Exit 304, Good Hope/Cullman.
listings.hold_reason: Truck wash listed only in a single third-party directory amenity list for Jack's; no primary source confirms an operating truck wash bay, hours or pricing.
listings.corroboration: Directory amenity lists for Jack's include 'truck wash', but this is single-sourced and unverified; held.

listings.name: Comfort Suites Cullman I-65 Exit 310
listings.description: Choice Hotels Comfort Suites near I-65 Exit 310 in Cullman; third-party driver directories report on-site truck parking.
listings.hold_reason: Truck/large-vehicle parking is claimed only by third-party directories (HotelGuides, TruckerPath); the official Choice Hotels page could not be fetched (HTTP 403) to confirm truck parking, so parking availability/type is unverified.
listings.corroboration: Address 2054 St Joseph Drive NW, phone 256-255-5999 and Exit 310 corroborate across directories; truck parking claim is not officially confirmed, so held.

listings.name: Quality Inn Cullman I-65 Exit 310
listings.description: Quality Inn (Choice Hotels) near I-65 Exit 310 in Cullman; directories report RV/bus/truck parking available.
listings.hold_reason: RV/bus/truck parking claimed by third-party listings only; official brand page not confirmed. Street address, ZIP and phone not independently verified, so left blank.
listings.corroboration: Multiple listings describe RV/bus/truck parking at Quality Inn Cullman Exit 310, but truck parking and full address are unverified by a primary source; held.

excluded.name: North Alabama Washout (291 Truck Wash)
excluded.reason: Out of segment - located at I-65 Exit 291, south of the seg2 range (exits 299-334).

excluded.name: Dodge City Shell
excluded.reason: Minor fuel station (reported 1-2 truck spaces); not a distinct freight/truck-stop-scale facility beyond the adjacent Petro Dodge City. Insufficient to list as a separate freight facility.

excluded.name: Quala Wash - Hanceville
excluded.reason: Industrial tank/tanker wash; on-I-65 accessibility, exact address and current operating status could not be independently confirmed.

excluded.name: Sleep Inn & Suites Cullman
excluded.reason: Truck parking claimed by a single directory only; address/identity and truck parking could not be independently confirmed.

excluded.name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash
excluded.reason: No Blue Beacon location exists on I-65 in this segment; nearest is in the Tuscaloosa/Cottondale area (I-20/59).

excluded.name: I-65 weigh station (seg2)
excluded.reason: No permanent weigh/inspection station could be confirmed on I-65 between exits 299 and 334; documented Alabama I-65 weigh facilities are further north (Athens NB/SB) and south. Omitted rather than guessed.

excluded.name: JM Onsite Repair / Fleet Clean (mobile)
excluded.reason: Mobile-only roadside/wash services with no fixed I-65 exit location; no verifiable fixed facility to list.
